name: opensidekick
description: Open-source, provider-agnostic AI browser agent Chrome extension. Bring your own LLM.

scripts.check: for f in $(git ls-files '*.js' '*.mjs'); do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && echo 'all JS OK'
scripts.zip: rm -f opensidekick.zip && zip -r opensidekick.zip manifest.json src icons LICENSE -x '*.DS_Store'
